ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ecosystems" (
  "ecosystem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecosystem */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the ecosystem (e.g., spring, stream, wetland) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ecosystem */,
  "geomorphology_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geomorphology of the ecosystem */,
  "vegetation_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vegetation type of the ecosystem */,
  "water_regime_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the water regime of the ecosystem */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the ecosystem */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the ecosystem in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ecosystem record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ecosystem record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecosystem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecosystems_geomorphology_id FOREIGN KEY ("geomorphology_id") REFERENCES geomorphologies ("geomorphology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecosystems_vegetation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vegetation_type_id") REFERENCES vegetation_types ("vegetation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ecosystems_water_regime_id FOREIGN KEY ("water_regime_id") REFERENCES water_regimes ("water_regime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geomorphologies" (
  "geomorphology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geomorphology */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the geomorphology (e.g., upland, lowland, floodplain) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geomorphology */,
  "geomorphology_type" TEXT /* Type of geomorphology (e.g., tectonic, fluvial, glacial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the geomorphology record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the geomorphology record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geomorphology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation_types" (
  "vegetation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vegetation type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vegetation type (e.g., freshwater wetlands, grasslands) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vegetation type */,
  "vegetation_class" TEXT /* Class of vegetation (e.g., aquatic, terrestrial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vegetation type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vegetation type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vegetation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_regimes" (
  "water_regime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water regime */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the water regime (e.g., permanent, temporary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the water regime */,
  "water_regime_type" TEXT /* Type of water regime (e.g., surface water, groundwater) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the water regime record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the water regime record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_regime_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "ecosystem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ecosystem the dataset belongs to */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, shapefile) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_ecosystem_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecosystem_id") REFERENCES ecosystems ("ecosystem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_ecosystem" (
  "dataset_ecosystem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset-ecosystem relationship */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "ecosystem_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ecosystem */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset-ecosystem relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset-ecosystem relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_ecosystem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ecosystem_ecosystem_id FOREIGN KEY ("ecosystem_id") REFERENCES ecosystems ("ecosystem_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ecosystem_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_downloads" (
  "dataset_download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset download */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset that was downloaded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who downloaded the dataset */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was downloaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset download record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset download record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_downloads_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used to generate the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
